title: Chris Bailey (musician, born 1950)
extract: Christopher Mark Bailey (31 May 1950 – 4 April 2013) was an Australian bass guitarist and vocalist. He was a member of various rock groups including Headband (1971–1974), the Angels (1976–1982, 2008–2013), GANGgajang (1984–2013) and the Stetsons (1987, 1997). Bailey died of throat cancer aged 62.
